content.en:
Soon, the auction ended.

Ye Tian had already obtained a place, so he only needed to go back and wait slowly.

It only took a few dozen days of Earth time, and in the Infinite Sea, such a short time was nothing at all.

"A void area near the Golden Sands Sea"

Ye Tian took a look at the information transmitted by the Time Trading House, and prepared to rush to Jinshahai immediately.

There is a time-space ladder to enter the Jinsha Sea in the Infinite Sea, and there is also a real holy land.

As a result, Ye Tian quickly arrived at Jinsha Sea from the time and space ladder of the True Saintless Land.

Subsequently.

He left the Golden Sands Sea and shuttled through the void area, shuttling for a long time before he came to the cemetery of the lord of the legendary realm.

Soon, there were more Transcendental Lords here.

Here, Ye Tian also met several Transcendent Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land, and they also greeted Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, you're here too!"

Several Transcendental Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land greeted each other.

These Transcendent Realm Lords are the Lord of Jinbei, the Lord of Huoyan, the Lord of the Clouds, and the Lord of Muyi.

Ye Tian responded to the four lords one by one.

Subsequently.

Lord Mu Yi said: "This ruin is the burial ground of the legendary realm lord Yang Lie Lord, the Yang Lie Lord is not very good-tempered, before he fell, I am afraid that his territory will be very dangerous, if the transcendent realm lord enters, I am afraid that he will die a lot, I suggest that we have to go in a little later, let them explore the road first." "

"I also think it's not easy to take away the good things inside, and rushing in the first one doesn't necessarily get benefits, it's likely to be the loss of a clone. Lord Jinbei said.

"You can go in at night. "

Ye Tian also agreed.

He wasn't in too much of a hurry, he didn't think that the other Transcendent Realm Lords would be the first to go in and take the Time River Bead.

At this time.

The entrance to this ruin was still sealed by a Legendary Realm Lord of the Time Firm.

When the others were almost there, the Legendary Realm Lord of the Time Merchant House opened the seal.

"Everyone, I wish you a great opportunity in this cemetery ruins!"

After saying that, the Legendary Realm Lord escaped into the long river of time and disappeared.

"Get in!"

One by one, the Transcendental Lords rushed into the gloomy entrance to the cemetery.

This cemetery is in a special void, and it is this entrance that is presented, and they do not know what is going on inside the cemetery.

But there were still many transcendent realm lords who were very bold and rushed in directly.

As soon as these transcendent lords broke into the cemetery, they immediately entered a sea of fire.

"It's not good, it's the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire, damn it, Lord Yang Lie has actually collected so many Immortal Dragon Rock Fires, forming the Immortal You Rock Fire Array, I can't stop it!"

Almost instantly, the transcendent lord was reduced to ashes.

Not only this Transcendent Realm Lord, but also many of the Transcendent Realm Lords who rushed in the first batch were almost ninety percent unable to bear it, and turned into ashes in an instant, and only a few top-notch Transcendent Realm Lords rushed out of the outside world from the Immortal Dragon Rock Sea of Fire.

......

"Someone's coming out!"

Ye Tiandao.

I saw a few transcendent realm lords rushing out of the cemetery with their heavily wounded bodies, and some of them still had immortal dragon rock fire on their bodies.

"Immortal Dragon Rock Fire?"

Ye Tian knew this flame, one of the most terrifying flames in the Void Region.

The Immortal Dragon Rock Fire can even be incinerated into ashes by the Transcendent Realm Lord, and only the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord can hardly shake the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire.

At this time.

Many of the Transcendental Lords already know what is going on inside.

The Immortal Dragon Rock Fire formed a sea of fire, and once it entered the cemetery, it would inevitably endure the burning of the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire.

If the physical strength is not enough, it will not be able to withstand the burning of the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire, and there will be no way to go deep into the cemetery

It can be said that the first level of entering the cemetery encountered a big problem.

"It's over, my body is not strong enough, I can't fight against the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire. "

"Unless you find an eternal treasure or a special secret treasure that can compete with the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire, you can break through the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire Sea. "

"I spent so much time buying places in vain, and I knew that I wouldn't have spent this unjust money. "

"Time Firm is too black-hearted, he knew that I couldn't wait to get through, and he sold us a place. "

"Although the reputation of the Time Firm is good, you expect them to be kind?

At this time, many Transcendental Realm Lords were intimidated and did not dare to enter, otherwise they would lose a clone.

The point is, this time, there are still some realm realm legendary lords who have purchased places, and now they are all desperate, even many transcendent realm lords who have condensed the legendary body can't bear the immortal dragon rock fire, they can't find death in the past?

"It's not good, the immortal dragon rock fire restrained my legendary body!"

Lord Mu Yi smiled bitterly.

"Anyway, if you come, you have to give it a try. Lord Jinbei said.

At this time, several transcendent realm lords looked at Ye Tian.

"'Endless Lord, are you still going to stick to it?'

The Lord of the Clouds asked.

"Naturally, I want to go in!" Ye Tian said: I am still very confident in my physical strength. "

Several transcendent realm lords had heard of Ye Tian's deeds and knew that Ye Tian was not an ordinary half-step transcendent realm legendary lord, so they did not persuade him.

"Let's go in together!"

Lord Kimber suggested.

"Yes!"

The five of them rushed into the entrance of the cemetery together.

Wow!

Heaven and earth have changed, and they have entered the sea of fire of the immortal dragon rock.

Rumble!!!!

The endless Immortal Dragon Rock Fire was burning their bodies, and Lord Mu Yi couldn't hold it anymore.

"No, I have to get out, or this doppelganger will definitely die. "

After saying that, Lord Mu Yi fled directly

Among them, the three Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords can still hold on, and the easiest (good Zhao) is Ye Tian

Ye Tian broke through the sea of gray mist and fire in the gray mist stone statue, and completed the reshaping of the body particles, and the strength of the body particles was very terrifying, comparable to the half-step legendary realm.

Therefore, even if the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire was very terrifying, it was difficult to help Ye Tian.

The other three Transcendent Realm Lords struggled to support themselves, and they were dumbfounded when they saw Ye Tian so relaxed.

"Endless Lord, aren't you afraid of the Immortal Dragon Rock Fire?"

The Lord of the Clouds asked.

"My body is a little special, so I'm not afraid of the immortal dragon rock fire. "

Ye Tian said with a smile.

When the three Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords heard this, they were immediately envious.

Immediately, they were about to break through the sea of fire of the Immortal Dragon Rock as fast as they could.

Finally, when the three Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords were about to be unable to support it, they broke through, but they were all severely injured, and they were afraid that they would need to recuperate for a long time.

And Ye Tian was almost uninjured

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
